title: task.scored v1
description: Event emitted by the Brain service (sos.services.brain) after it scores a newly created task via the coherence formula. Published to the SOS bus so observers can record the ranking before dispatch.

type.description: Message type discriminator. Always 'task.scored' for this schema.

source.description: Bus identity of the emitting agent. Must follow the 'agent:<name>' convention where name is lowercase alphanumeric with dashes.

target.description: Bus channel or agent address this message is routed to. Defaults to the shared task channel.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this event was emitted.

version.description: SemVer of the message payload schema. Major bumps are breaking; minor/patch are additive.

message_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this message envelope. Used for deduplication and tracing.

trace_id.description: W3C Trace Context trace-id (32 hex chars). Optional; minted at ingress when absent.

payload.description: Scoring output data describing the computed rank for a newly created task.

task_id.description: Identifier of the task being scored

urgency.description: Urgency bucket used in the weight lookup

unblock_count.description: Number of tasks currently blocked by this one

cost.description: Token-cost estimate used as the divisor

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the score was computed
